title: Neocreate 6
description: as we welcome create to 1.21.1 I made this modpack with create, avalable add-ons and complimentry mods to bring to life your CREATive ideas
body: Experience Minecraft 1.21.1 at its finest with this streamlined modpack, built around Create 6.0, essential performance enhancements, and a curated selection of complementary add-ons. Designed for the Neo-Forge loader, it delivers a smooth, feature-rich environment perfect for intricate automation, ingenious contraptions, and a stable gaming experience. Enjoy the next level of creativity and optimization in your Minecraft world! NOTE: pictures will be uploaded soon, been busy preping for friends wedding)
